The '''Gian heavy patrol speeder''' was a [[repulsorlift]] vehicle and heavy patrol [[Landspeeder|speeder]] used by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces|Royal Guards]] of [[Naboo]]. It was a heavier version of the [[Flash speeder]].

==Characteristics==
Gian heavy patrol speeders were normally used for crowd control and urban defense. They were equipped with side-mounted [[laser cannon]]s. Some modified versions were also outfitted with a hood-mounted heavy [[cannon]] that was powerful enough to penetrate the metal shell of an [[Armored Assault Tank Mk I|Armored Assault Tank]].<ref name="SWE Gian speeder" />

==History==
===Republic service===
During the [[Invasion of Naboo]], [[Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala]] and [[Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka|Panaka]] used Gian speeders and [[Flash speeder]]s to infiltrate and liberate the capital city of [[Theed]] from the occupation of the [[Trade Federation]].<ref name="SWE Gian speeder" />

===New Republic service===
Decades later, around the time of the [[Battle of Starkiller Base]], the [[Resistance]] used [[Gian-211 patrol speeder]]s.<ref name="TFA VD">''[[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref><ref name="TFA">{{Film|VII}}</ref>
